# Ling Cheng

> Personal profile site for Ling Cheng, AI leader in computational biology and education technology.

## About
Ling Cheng works at the intersection of artificial intelligence and computational biology, currently leading AI work for PathCision Medicine in computational protein design and target discovery.

## Key Topics
- Artificial Intelligence (AI)
- Machine Learning (ML)
- Computational Biology
- Computational Protein Design
- Target Discovery
- Natural Language Processing (NLP)
- Education Technology

## Primary Page
- https://tlingf.github.io/
